prompt: For every Markdown file in this repository, report the file path, its H1 title (first line starting with '# '), and the number of H2 sections (lines starting with '## '). Then list any markdown files that have no H1 title. End with the total number of H2 sections across all files. One line per file.
description: Fan-out: glob all .md (9 files) + view each + parse headings. Direct comparison to the as-shipped run.

prompt: For every file in this repository (all extensions, excluding the .git directory), report its path, its line count, and whether it contains the word 'token' (case-insensitive). Sort the list by line count descending. At the end, print the total number of files and the total number of lines. One line per file.
description: Stronger fan-out: read all ~20 files + per-file line count + keyword check. Baseline must read every file sequentially.
